extraction.one_line_summary: KRISTOFF Alexander won the sprint from a tailwind 1300m straight, holding off CAVENDISH and BOUHANNI after peloton caught break with 5km remaining
tactical_patterns: Direct Energy committed full team resources to BOUHANNI but failed, suggesting their sprint train weaker than UAE's setup
Breakaway absorbed with exactly 5km remaining indicates sprinter teams calibrated catch timing precisely for lead-out optimization

rider_signals.CAVENDISH Mark: positive: second place finish with tailwind positioning suggests he's finding form despite no dedicated train mentioned
rider_signals.GREIPEL André: negative: dropped before final 5km on flat stage signals serious deficit compared to top sprinters
